steps.t: Gwenfor Mellion tells you the plants are wilting, and a shadow looming over the wild in the forest to the south-east. The forest she speaks of can be …
Gwenfor awaits your report. Gwenfor can be found in Glyn Helyg.
Gwenfor Mellion wants you to go deeper into the forest and confirm her suspicions. Continue further down the path to the south-east across the bridge.…
The corruption deeper in the forest has gone on to affect even the beasts. You should tell Gwenfor in Glyn Helyg immediately.
Nuddo Sutchic can be found in Lintrev to the north. Gwenfor has asked you to share your findings with them.
